description_long: This helmet features a sleek, rounded shell with a smooth, glossy white exterior and a prominent, dark-tinted full-face visor that wraps around the front. The visor is bordered by a metallic trim, adding a modern, high-tech appearance. A wide brown band encircles the helmet horizontally, intersected by subtle panel lines and small, technical markings, including warning symbols and barcode-like graphics on the rear. The lower portion of the helmet is black, likely providing additional reinforcement or padding. The surface is mostly unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist, futuristic design. No visible vents or external fasteners are present, suggesting a streamlined, aerodynamic construction.
description: A glossy white, rounded helmet with a dark full-face visor, brown accent band, and minimal technical markings, exuding a modern, futuristic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark-tinted full-face visor dominating the helmet's face, bordered by metallic trim.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlights the smooth, white shell, brown accent band, and seamless visor integration.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals technical markings, warning symbols, and a barcode-like graphic on the brown band.
description_view_3: Right rear angle displays the helmet's continuous curves, brown band, and the absence of visible vents or fasteners.
attribute_graphic_design: Technical markings and warning symbols on the rear brown band; otherwise plain with no decorative graphics.
